name: Off-Context GRPO: Learning to Reason on Hard Problems using Privileged Information
summary: arXiv:2607.19313v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) improves reasoning in large language models. Yet, typical RLVR approaches fail on difficult p...
description: arXiv:2607.19313v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) improves reasoning in large language models. Yet, typical RLVR approaches fail on difficult problems: when a model cannot generate any correct solutions, it receives \textit{zero} learning signal. Providing privileged guidance during training, such as solution prefixes, can help overcome this...
author: Priyank Agrawal, Ankur Samanta, Shervin Ghasemlou, Jalaj Bhandari, Kavosh Asadi, Daniel Jiang, Aditya Modi
